message:
fix: wire isRefreshing in Service Exports card for refresh icon animation (#8681)

The Service Exports card never passed isRefreshing to useCardLoadingState,
so the refresh icon stayed static during background data fetches. Added
isRefreshing state tracking to the useServiceExports hook (set during
silent background refetches, cleared on completion) and wired it through
the card component to useCardLoadingState.

Fixes #8672

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
